entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cultivated species Cicer arietinum used in wide crossing and as rootstocks

entities.name: C. PINNATIFIDUM
entities.description: Wild species used in wide crossing with Cicer arietinum

entities.name: ANDROGENESIS
entities.description: The induction of embryo development from microspores or pollen grains

entities.name: WIDE CROSSING
entities.description: Crossing between distantly related species Cicer arietinum and C. pinnatifidum

entities.name: EMBRYO RESCUE
entities.description: In vitro rescue of hybrid embryos to obtain hybrid plants

entities.name: ALBINISM
entities.description: Lack of chlorophyll pigment in hybrid plants

entities.name: ZEATIN-RICH MEDIUM
entities.description: Culture medium containing zeatin used to turn albino hybrids semi-green

entities.name: LIGHT
entities.description: Environmental factor used alongside zeatin-rich medium to induce semi-green color

entities.name: GRAFTING
entities.description: Process of attaching hybrid shoots to chickpea rootstocks

entities.name: ZEATIN NUTRIENT SOLUTION
entities.description: Nutrient solution with 1.0 mg/litre zeatin used to induce flower buds and microspore division

entities.name: MICROSPOROGENESIS
entities.description: The process of formation of microspores

entities.name: MULTICELLULAR MICROSPORES
entities.description: Microspores that have undergone division to contain multiple cells

entities.name: ACETOCARMINE STAINING
entities.description: Technique used to observe divisions in microspores
